title: Single-threaded Concurrency
summary: Single-threaded concurrency designs are an alternative to multithreaded concurrency designs which achieves many of the same benefits (task switching) without many of the multithreading problems (thread update visibility, race conditions etc.etc.).
content: Single-threaded concurrency designs are an alternative to multithreaded concurrency designs which achieves many of the same benefits (task switching) without many of the multithreading problems (thread update visibility, race conditions etc.etc.).
